author: y4rr
content: Result: C9.3 conformance suite live. 55 tests covering 10 modules: container (5 tests), module (6 tests), parameter (4 tests), parameter_container (4 tests), buffer (3 tests), hooks (5 tests), rnn/lstm (5 tests), rnn/gru (3 tests), rnn/rnn (3 tests), rnn_utils (5 tests), lora (5 tests), qat (7 tests). Fixture script exits 0 (38 fixtures). cargo test -p ferrotorch-nn --test conformance_nn_structural: 55 passed, 0 failed. 0 cascade bugs filed.
